scenarios.name: landing-page-cta-color-test
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets all rubric items, while Response B lacks hypothesis, sample size, metrics, and traffic split details.

scenarios.name: product-page-mvt-headline-image
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers more rubric items (hypothesis, metrics, server‑side, checklist) but still misses MVT and the exact sample‑size calculation; Response A lacks hypothesis, metrics, and sample‑size, so it scores lower.
